features.description: Fix slow track page navigation (auto-advance and manual). Currently app/track/[slug]/page.tsx has NO generateStaticParams, so every track page is dynamically rendered (server round-trip on each navigation). This causes 5-30s delays when auto-advancing or clicking next/prev. FIX: Add generateStaticParams() to app/track/[slug]/page.tsx that returns all track slugs from getAllTracks(). Import getAllTracks from @/lib/tracks. This pre-renders all track pages at build time, making client-side navigation instant. ALSO add export const dynamicParams = false to reject unknown slugs. DONE: pnpm build shows track/[slug] routes as SSG (filled circle) not Dynamic (f). VERIFY: pnpm build passes AND build output shows '● /track/[slug]' (SSG) not 'ƒ /track/[slug]' (Dynamic). NOT TOUCH: Do not modify TrackPageClient.tsx, do not modify lib/audio-context.tsx.
steps: Add generateStaticParams() that returns getAllTracks().map(t => ({ slug: t.slug }))
Run pnpm build and verify track pages show as SSG (●) not Dynamic (ƒ)

features.description: Also add generateStaticParams to app/album/[slug]/page.tsx for the same reason — album pages are also dynamically rendered causing slow navigation. Import albums from @/lib/albums. Add generateStaticParams() returning albums.map(a => ({ slug: a.slug })). Add export const dynamicParams = false. DONE: pnpm build shows album/[slug] as SSG. VERIFY: pnpm build passes AND build output shows '● /album/[slug]' (SSG). NOT TOUCH: Do not modify AlbumPageClient.tsx.

Populate missing lyrics for 11 tracks in lib/albums.ts. These tracks have lyrics: '' (empty string). For EACH track listed below, find the corresponding lyrics markdown file in content/songs/batch*/lyrics/, extract ONLY the lyrics text (skip any YAML frontmatter between --- markers, skip any metadata headers), and paste the lyrics into the track's lyrics field in lib/albums.ts as a template literal. The 11 tracks with empty lyrics and their likely lyric file locations: (1) first-thousand → content/songs/batch2/lyrics/08-first-thousand.md, (2) go-viral → content/songs/batch2/lyrics/09-go-viral.md, (3) you-aint-that → search all batch*/lyrics/ for a file containing 'You Ain't That', (4) fire-with-grace → content/songs/batch2/lyrics/18-fire-with-grace.md, (5) the-magic-loop → content/songs/batch2/lyrics/16-the-magic-loop.md, (6) not-venture-scale → content/songs/batch2/lyrics/12-not-venture-scale.md, (7) smile-through-the-silence → search all batch*/lyrics/, (8) push-the-car → search all batch*/lyrics/, (9) its-never-going-well → search all batch*/lyrics/, (10) dont-give-em-your-number → search all batch*/lyrics/, (11) when-enough-is-enough → content/songs/batch2/lyrics/19-when-enough-is-enough.md. IMPORTANT: Search by grepping for the song title across all batch lyrics folders if the filename doesn't match. If NO lyrics file exists for a track, leave it as empty string and log which ones are missing. Format lyrics exactly like existing tracks — use backtick template literals with line breaks. DONE: At least 8 of 11 tracks have non-empty lyrics in lib/albums.ts. VERIFY: pnpm build passes. NOT TOUCH: Do not modify any track fields other than lyrics. Do not change track order, slugs, metadata, or any other fields.
steps: Read lib/albums.ts and find all tracks with lyrics: '' or lyrics: ""
For each missing track, find the lyrics file in content/songs/batch*/lyrics/
If filename doesn't match slug, grep for the song title across all lyrics folders
Read each lyrics file, extract just the lyrics (skip frontmatter)
Update the lyrics field in lib/albums.ts for each track
Run pnpm build to verify no syntax errors
Count how many were populated — must be at least 8 of 11
